## 500+ Metal Building Types

Explore over 500 types of metal buildings with the best metal building company, the top Metal building installer. Our structures, like garages, barns, workshops, and commercial buildings, are both good-looking and sturdy, all while staying budget-friendly and customizable. You can pick from various colors for the roofing, side panels, and trim. We work closely with you to create customized metal-building kits that fit your needs. Check out our plans, prices, and photos of popular carports, metal garages, workshops, warehouses, barndo shell, storage buildings, and metal buildings construction. To get an accurate price quote, talk to our helpful building specialists today.

## Design Online

##### Customize your space in 3D with our online design tool! Enter your info and start creating your metal building now!

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201000%20666'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

###### Quality

We build it right. And stand behind it.
Our metal buildings come standard with 40 Year Metal,
Galvanized Rust Resistant Tubing and a 3-year workmanship warranty.

###### Customize

We have a variety of options available:

With our ability to customize your metal building, you can design anything your mind can imagine.

###### Experience

We have years of experience providing outdoor structures. All of our metal buildings are installed by Leland’s certified professional crews that take pride in their work.

###### Flexibility

We offer multiple payment options to fit your needs. Buy with cash directly from Leland’s or rent to own with AFG Rentals. All of our RTO orders qualify for 90 days, same as cash!

> We believe in providing leadership and motivation for all team members to empower them to achieve their dreams and invest in relationships with our clients and remember to always do the right thing.

### [Watch How We Work](https://lelandsmetalbuildings.com/\#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjI4NzQwIiwidG9nZ2xlIjpmYWxzZX0%3D)

#### Specialists In Metal Building Construction

With so many companies now constructing metal buildings, it’s important to remember they are not all the same. Other companies “bid” out each job. The lowest price and quality metal, the cheapest installation crew. As a customer, you do not even know who is manufacturing or building until delivery day. And of course, if there are any problems, good luck.

We take a different approach. The best materials, we train and schedule our own crews, we work with only the best, high integrity dealers and we stand behind our work. Buy from the trusted name that has been constructing outdoor structures for decades. It’s metal, the Leland’s way!

[Contact Us](https://lelandsmetalbuildings.com/contact/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201260%20945'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Providing a culture of respect that fosters healthy, open, and honest communication with everyone.
